summary: Comprehensive testing of refactored GameShop Nepal API after server.py modularization into 11 route files. All API endpoints working correctly. Frontend functioning properly with products, reviews, orders, and admin panel.

minor.issue: Root health endpoint returns 404 due to ingress routing (only /api/* routes to backend) - expected behavior

issues: Chart dimension warning in console - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring was successful - all 11 route modules are functioning correctly
Auth routes (routes/auth.py): Login working with token generation
Product routes (routes/products.py): Public products, categories, admin products working
Order routes (routes/orders.py): Orders listing, new confirmed count working
Review routes (routes/reviews.py): Public reviews, admin reviews, reward settings working
Promotion routes (routes/promotions.py): Promo codes, credit settings, bundles working
Analytics routes (routes/analytics.py): Overview, visit tracking working
Engagement routes (routes/engagement.py): Referral, newsletter, wishlist, daily reward, multiplier working
Content routes (routes/content.py): Payment methods, social links, blog, notification bar working
Ads routes (routes/ads.py): Active ads by position working

success_rate.backend: 97% (33/34 tests passed - 1 expected failure for non-API route)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (Homepage, Product page, Admin Login, Admin Dashboard, Admin Orders all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: The server.py refactoring from 6000+ lines monolithic file to modular route files was successful. All endpoints tested and working. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_refactored_api.py contains comprehensive tests for all route modules. Admin panel at /panelgsnadminbackend/login (not /admin). Admin credentials: gsnadmin/gsnadmin.

testing_details.failed_test_reason: /health endpoint (non-API prefixed route) returns 404 due to ingress configuration - expected
frontend_pages_tested: Homepage - Products, Reviews, Ads loading correctly
Product Detail Page - Netflix Premium Profile loaded with plans and pricing
Admin Login Page - Form visible and functional
Admin Dashboard - Statistics, charts, recent orders working
Admin Orders Page - Order list with status and actions
